title: senecio × rolandi-bonaparte
intro: Senecio × rolandi-bonaparte, also known as Roland's ragwort, is a hybrid plant species in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Senecio × rolandi-bonaparte can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
